cause: Winter storm system across Southeast + DHS shutdown TSA staffing pressure

cause: Residual winter storm effects + NE corridor winds
fwd: Conditions improving; spring break travel builds.

cause: Spring storm development + TSA staffing shortages Day 10
fwd: Spring storm activity building through weekend.

cause: Major spring storm system + TSA staffing shortages (Day 12) + peak weekend volume
fwd: Storm exits Mon; residual crew repositioning through Tue.

cause: Spring storms developing + TSA staffing gaps Day 15
fwd: Storm strengthening into weekend; elevated disruption expected.

cause: Spring thunderstorm system across Midwest/South + TSA gaps
fwd: Storm clearing Sun; operational recovery Mon-Tue.

cause: Spring Break peak weekend + weather + TSA staffing shortages Day 21
fwd: Peak Spring Break week; expect elevated OTA contacts through Mar 22.

cause: Spring Break return weekend surge + storm systems + TSA staffing gaps
fwd: Return peak ends Sunday; near-normal by Mon-Tue.

cause: Spring Break week peak + thunderstorm activity across Midwest
fwd: Spring Break volume continues through Mar 29.

cause: Spring storms + Spring Break travel + DHS shutdown Day 29
fwd: Storm activity continues through weekend.

cause: Spring Break return peak + severe storms + TSA staffing shortages
fwd: Spring Break return surge tapering Mon; storms clearing.

cause: Spring Break peak + severe Midwest thunderstorms + TSA staffing shortages
fwd: Spring Break winds down Apr 1; storm system exits by weekend.

cause: Post-Spring Break normalization + weather systems + DHS shutdown Day 35
fwd: Stable conditions; Easter travel building.

cause: Weather systems + DHS shutdown TSA staffing shortages (Day 36)
fwd: Easter weekend approaches; expect significant volume build Apr 2-3.

cause: Easter travel surge begins + weather systems + DHS shutdown TSA staffing
fwd: Easter peak builds through Fri; expect HIGH conditions Apr 3-6.

cause: Spring storms compounded by TSA staffing shortages from ongoing DHS shutdown
fwd: TSA back pay flowing via executive order but staffing gaps persist.

cause: Severe thunderstorms & tornado risk at ORD + Easter/Good Friday peak + TSA shutdown
fwd: Residual delays Sat Apr 4 as ORD repositions aircraft/crews.

cause: Thunderstorm backlog from Good Friday + Easter Saturday peak volume
fwd: Easter Sunday return travel will spike demand; ORD backlog may persist 24-48 hrs.

cause: Severe Easter storms (thunderstorms, heavy rain, flooding) + record holiday passenger volumes
fwd: Residual disruption Mon-Tue as aircraft/crews reposition.

cause: Easter Monday return surge + cascading effects from 4-day storm sequence since Good Friday
fwd: Disruptions taper Tue-Wed; residual crew imbalances at ATL, ORD, LGA.

cause: Southeast thunderstorms + post-Easter recovery + DHS shutdown TSA staffing gaps (Day 52)
fwd: Airlines targeting Wed-Thu for near-normal ops. Residual crew repositioning through Wed AM.

cause: Post-Easter cascade + Midwest thunderstorms; FAA ground stop at ORD; AA network-wide meltdown
fwd: Residual delays Thu as DFW/ORD recover from 6-day cascade.

cause: Eastern US spring storms + Washington Dulles ATC facility issue; SFO runway 1R closure
fwd: Residual GDPs into Fri AM; SFO runway constraint continues for weeks.

cause: High winds along NE corridor + thunderstorms in FL/TX
fwd: Weather pushing east overnight; residual NE delays Saturday AM.

cause: Spring thunderstorms hitting leisure hubs + post-Easter volume + ATC capacity constraints
fwd: DEN high-wind ground stop Sun Apr 12; AA travel waiver for DFW Apr 12.

cause: Thunderstorms/high winds across multiple regions + East Coast congestion; DEN ground stop (3 hrs)
fwd: Spring storm pattern continues mid-week; no major system-wide events next 24 hrs.

cause: Severe thunderstorms across Central/Eastern US + FAA ATC staffing shortages amid gov shutdown (LAX ground stop)
fwd: Storm system shifting east; NE airports elevated risk next 24h. ATC staffing strain continues.

cause: Severe thunderstorm system shifting east from Central US; multiple hub ground delay programs active (ORD, ATL, SFO, TPA)
fwd: Storm system exits East Coast next 24 hrs; residual delays Wed as crews/aircraft reposition. Improving by Thursday.

cause: Thunderstorms at ORD (late-night FAA ground stop) + continued post-Easter network recovery
fwd: Apr 16 flagged as earliest realistic clean national day; ORD storm system clearing east by morning push; gradual normalization.
